pr.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 - 68M ternary params, val_bpb=1.1770, systematic analysis of ternary limitations

output.summary: BitNet's ternary Transformer widens its MLP, packs BitLinear STE weights via base-3, and raises LR/extends warmdown while simulating fp16 scales because int6 tricks fail.
techniques: BitLinear ternary projections with wider MLP packed via base-3 for 1.6 bpp artifacts
fp16 scale simulation during training to mirror serialized quantization rounding
Higher LR plus longer warmdown to stabilize noisy STE updates without int6 regularizers
